name: @wanuky10/web-editor
description: Web editor library: RichTextEditor (contenteditable, toolbar modular, superscript/subscript, alignment, color picker, font size, table, paste cleanup, image upload, markdown shortcuts, event system on/off/emit, history/undo) dan ImageEditor v2.0.0 (Canvas: crop rect/circle, zoom, flip, rotate, rotasi bebas, filter via ctx.filter, preset filter, rasio aspek crop, history/undo, pinch-to-zoom, muatUrl, event system) — tanpa dependensi eksternal
author: Wahid Nur Hakim
